---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Open Video
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement
A clear description of what problem this feature would solve. Example: "I want to render videos in WebM format because..."

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to happen. If you have a specific API or UX in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered
What alternatives have you tried or considered? Why don't they work?

## Would you be willing to contribute this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] I can help test/review
- [ ] Just suggesting

## Additional context
Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
